steps.title: Grow strains of interest on Löwenstein-Jensen...
steps.instruction: Grow strains of interest on Löwenstein-Jensen medium at 37°C until growth becomes clearly visible

steps.title: Transfer an appropriate number (1-3 inoculation...
steps.instruction: Transfer an appropriate number (1-3 inoculation loops) of bacterial cells into a microcentrifuge tube containing 400 μl TE-Puffer

steps.title: Incubate for 20 min at 80°...
steps.instruction: Incubate for 20 min at 80° C in a water bath to kill bacteria (check temperature with thermometer as this seems to be crucial for DNA quantity and quality afterwards)

steps.title: Centrifuge for 5 min at 13000...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 5 min at 13000 rcf, discard supernatant and add 400 μl TE-Puffer

steps.title: Add 50 μl of 10mg/ml lysozym,...
steps.instruction: Add 50 μl of 10mg/ml lysozym, vortex und incubate at least 1 h at 37° C or o/n (we always incubate over night)

steps.title: Add 70 μl of 10% SDS...
steps.instruction: Add 70 μl of 10% SDS and 10 μl proteinase, vortex shortly and incubate 1 hr at 60° C

steps.title: Add 100 μl 5M NaCl
steps.instruction: Add 100 μl 5M NaCl

steps.title: Add 100 μl CTAB/NaCl mix (prewarmed...
steps.instruction: Add 100 μl CTAB/NaCl mix (prewarmed at 65°C), vortex until the liquid content becomes white and incubate 10 min at 65° C

steps.title: Add approx
steps.instruction: Add approx. 750 μl chloroform/isoamyl alcohol mix (24:1), vortex 10 sec and centrifuge 15 min at 13000 rcf at RT

steps.title: Transfer aqueous supernatant in a new tube
steps.instruction: Transfer aqueous supernatant in a new tube

steps.title: Add 0,6 volume (450 μl) isopropanol,...
steps.instruction: Add 0,6 volume (450 μl) isopropanol, mix carefully and incubate 30 min at -20°C

steps.title: Centrifuge 15 min at 13000 g
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 15 min at 13000 g

steps.title: Remove most of supernatant and add...
steps.instruction: Remove most of supernatant and add 500 μl of cold 70 % ethanol

steps.title: Centrifuge for 15 min at ±11,000 xg
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 15 min at ±11,000 xg.

steps.title: Discard most of the supernatant; leave...
steps.instruction: Discard most of the supernatant; leave about 20 μL (3 mm height) above the pellet (see Note 4).

steps.title: Add 1 mL of cold 70%...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of cold 70% ethanol (from the -20 °C freezer) and turn the tube a few times upside down to wash the DNA precipitate.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 5 min at ±11,000 xg
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 5 min at ±11,000 xg.

steps.title: Discard most of the supernatant; leave...
steps.instruction: Discard most of the supernatant; leave about 20 μL (3 mm height) above the pellet (see Note 4).

steps.title: Centrifuge for 1 min at ±11,000 xg
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 1 min at ±11,000 xg.

steps.title: Remove the remaining supernatant from above...
steps.instruction: Remove the remaining supernatant from above the pellet by pipetting very carefully with a 20μL pipette (see Note 15).

steps.title: Permit the pellet to dry for...
steps.instruction: Permit the pellet to dry for ± 15 min at RT. Check whether all ethanol is evaporated. If not, then extend the drying time.

steps.title: Dissolve the pellet in the amount...
steps.instruction: Dissolve the pellet in the amount of 1X TE estimated in step 10 (see Note 16).
